sources.description: Publisher of Call of Duty. Official corporate communications and press releases.

sources.description: Major gaming news outlet with exclusive developer interviews and hands-on previews.

sources.description: Technology news and reviews publication with gaming coverage.

sources.name: Community Leakers
sources.description: Unverified community sources including social media leakers and data miners. Information should be treated with caution.
